headline: Crown Castle Closes $8.5B Divestiture, Raises 2026 AFFO View
summary: CCI closes the $8.5B sale of small cells and fiber units, boosting the 2026 AFFO outlook and sharpening its focus as a pure-play U.S. tower company.
